stance: Says she would tackle the housing crisis by cutting red tape and investing in attainable housing.
quote: expanding affordable housing

stance: Centers her campaign on creating good-paying jobs and reviving tourism statewide, especially outside Las Vegas and Reno.
quote: creating good-paying jobs

stance: Touts her record leading on gun-safety legislation and pledges to keep communities safe.
quote: leading the fight for commonsense gun safety laws to protect communities across our state

stance: Pediatric ICU nurse running to support small businesses, strengthen tourism, and grow Nevada's economy.
quote: running for Lieutenant Governor to support small businesses, strengthen tourism, grow Nevada's economy, and serve all communities with common-sense leadership.

stance: Says the Live Entertainment tax shuts out female and independent producers; runs on entertainment-industry economic expertise.
quote: The Live Entertainment tax prevents female producers and independent companies from producing shows in Nevada.

stance: Warns parts of rural Nevada have poisoned drinking water and prioritizes clean water and green energy.
quote: Parts of rural Nevada only have poisoned drinking water. Entire towns and cities may lose their power supply.

stance: A self-described reproductive-rights advocate who vows to fight restrictive abortion laws.
quote: I have PCOS/PMOS. I am a huge repro rights advocate. I will fight to ensure draconian laws made by unaffected men are permanently erased.

stance: Backs abolishing ICE at the state level via safe zones, legal protections, and ending cooperation with federal authorities.
quote: BridgieNix believes in abolishing ice entirely

stance: Says tourism needs upgrades and budget reform to be renovated for all generations.
quote: We pivot. We need new upgrades and budget reform to make renovating tourism to the needs of all generations possible.

stance: Touts Nevada job growth and a statewide tourism boom during his tenure as a core part of his record.
quote: Employment increased 6 percent (close to 100,000 new jobs), the highest rate nationally over all other states, including Texas and Florida.

stance: Former LVMPD captain who frames safe homes, businesses, and tourist destinations as a priority.
quote: Lieutenant Governor Anthony knows that both Nevada residents and tourists deserve safe homes, businesses, neighborhoods, communities, and tourist destinations.

stance: Highlights Nevada's transportation and infrastructure rankings as a strength during his tenure.
quote: Nevada's transportation and infrastructure has been consistently ranked among the best in the United States since the time Stavros was first elected as Lieutenant Governor.

stance: Makes unwinding 'soft-on-crime' policies a priority and backs stricter sentencing and the governor's crime bill.
quote: implementing what's in that crime bill is going to be really important

stance: Pledges to investigate election fraud and says the AG's office has been reactive rather than proactive on it.
quote: They have been reactive and not proactive

stance: Says lawsuits against the federal government should turn on Nevada's interest, not the president's party.
quote: It doesn't matter who the president is. It comes back to looking at whether or not it's going to benefit Nevada

stance: Pledges to cooperate with federal enforcement, end obstruction, and prevent Nevada from sheltering criminal activity.
quote: Immigration laws exist to protect public safety, national security, and the rule of law.

stance: Says COVID-era election law changes created vulnerabilities; vows to investigate fraud and enforce election laws.
quote: Nevada's election laws were significantly altered during COVID, creating vulnerabilities that undermine public confidence in our elections.

stance: Frames the AG office as answering to the Constitution and citizens rather than special interests or political elites.
quote: Nevadans deserve an Attorney General who doesn't answer to special interests or the political elite, but fights for the Constitution, law enforcement, and every law-abiding citizen.

stance: Frames secure elections as nonpartisan and pledges to restore transparency, accountability, and security to every step.
quote: Public confidence in our elections is essential. As Secretary of State, I will focus on restoring transparency, accountability, and security to every step of the process.

stance: Platform calls for voter ID with proof of citizenship, paper ballots only, ending universal mail-in voting, and re-registering all voters.
quote: Paper Ballots — No Electronic Voting Machines

stance: Says the secretary of state, as chief election officer, must be someone voters trust; vows to enforce Trump's election-integrity order.
quote: Enforce President Trump's Election Integrity Executive Order

stance: Would seek historic State Infrastructure Bank funding for affordable housing, with a focus on seniors.
quote: work with the legislature to secure historic funding for the State Infrastructure Bank for affordable housing

stance: Pitches a $300 million infrastructure-bank investment to create jobs and support small businesses.
quote: As Treasurer, I will fight for a historic $300 million in funding to create jobs in our community and provide infrastructure support for small businesses.

stance: Warns the Millennium Scholarship is near insolvency and pledges a long-term funding fix.
quote: As Treasurer, I will institute a long-term funding solution to ensure we keep our college promise to the children of Nevada.

stance: Would modernize unclaimed property with reasonable claim periods and automatic returns to get residents their money back.
quote: reasonable claims periods to create a new revenue source and automatic returns so you get your money back as quickly and easily as possible.

stance: Defines the treasurer's job as protecting taxpayer dollars, managing debt carefully, and keeping Nevada financially stable.
quote: The Treasurer's job is to protect taxpayer dollars, manage debt carefully, and make long-term financial decisions that keep Nevada stable

stance: Emphasizes transparency, strong oversight, and ethical decision-making in managing public money.
quote: Nevadans deserve to know how their money is managed. Transparency, strong oversight, and ethical decision-making are essential

stance: Says state financial tools should support housing affordability without creating bigger problems later.
quote: State financial decisions shape housing costs, school construction, and infrastructure. Responsible stewardship means using Nevada's financial tools to support affordability today

stance: Ex-CME trader running to keep Nevada fiscally sound by eliminating waste, fraud, and abuse.
quote: Keep Nevada strong, transparent, and fiscally sound - eliminating waste, fraud, and abuse.

stance: Says taxpayers deserve to know exactly where their money goes and how it is managed.
quote: Taxpayers deserve to know exactly where their money goes, how it's managed, and why decisions are made.

stance: Pledges responsible investment returns and prudent stewardship, and takes protecting public pensions seriously.
quote: I'll pursue strong, responsible return on investment through prudent stewardship.

stance: Self-styled budget watchdog who says he has exposed large-scale government waste, fraud, and abuse.
quote: Drew has exposed hundreds of billions of dollars in waste, fraud and abuse of taxpayers' money at all levels of government

stance: Cites ending regressive taxes that harmed lower-income individuals and loosening regulation on entrepreneurs as part of his record.
quote: Ended regressive taxes that harmed lower-income individuals

stance: Reno engineer whose priorities are on-time financial reports, transparency, and accountability in the office.
quote: I am about creating pathways to success that underscore transparency and collaborative effort

stance: Sees the controller as a check that protects every dollar and holds the treasurer, legislature, and governor accountable.
quote: the Controller's office protects every dollar in Nevada. It holds the Treasurer, Legislature, and Governor accountable

stance: Criticizes delayed release of Nevada's annual financial report, arguing timely audits build trust in government.
Navy veteran who pledges financial reporting that is on time, accurate, and transparent.
